reference: I am twenty years old, male. I have problems with my penis. Itchy and white fluid comes out with a bad smell. I went to the laboratory. The result was red blood cells zero-two and pus cells eight-twelve. What happened? My girlfriend and I went to a hotel. We had intercourse. Is that the reason, or is it because the towel and bed are not clean?
text: I am 20 years old, male. I have problem penis: itchy and white fluid comes out with a bad smell. I went to the laboratory, there was red blood cells 02 and pus cells 812. What happened? My girlfriend and I went to a hotel, we had intercourse. Is that the reason, or is it because the towel and bed are not clean?
